items.title: CVE-2026-40355, CVE-2026-40356: MIT krb5 1.18+ Unauthenticated Network read overrun and null pointer dereference
items.summary:
Posted by Cem Onat Karagun on Apr 27 Hi, 
 
just a quick note that MIT krb5 has fixed two unauthenticated network 
NegoEx parsing vulnerabilities. 
 
Affected versions: 
 
MIT krb5 1.18 and later, when an application calls 
gss_accept_sec_context() on a system with a NegoEx mechanism registered 
in /etc/gss/mech

items.title: Major operation targets one of Scotland’s most violent crime networks
items.summary: Violence, drugs and controlThe gang is known for using violence to dominate territory and protect its criminal activity.
